Write a clear CTA button label (2-4 words)
Shopify internal URL (shopify://collections/... or shopify://pages/...) or empty string
Write the product page eyebrow badge label (e.g. "Hecho en México · Real Fruit Agua Fresca"). Short, punchy, highlights origin or key claim.
Single emoji prefix for the badge (e.g. 🇲🇽, ✦, 🌿). Match the brand identity. Leave empty if not applicable.
Hex color for the badge, matching the brand primary color (e.g. "#D4266A").
Write product benefit bullet 1. Specific ingredient or quality claim. Start with action or ingredient.
Write product benefit bullet 2. Different from item 1. Highlight a unique feature.
Write product benefit bullet 3. Cover a different value prop (e.g. format, variety, dietary claim).
Write product benefit bullet 4. Focus on value or quantity (e.g. "50 servings per bag").
Write product benefit bullet 5. Convenience or ease of use (e.g. "Just add water").
Write the value prop tag label (e.g. "★ Best Value", "★ Most Popular", "★ Fan Favorite").
Write the value prop description highlighting the best deal (e.g. "1kg bag — 100 glasses, only 27¢ each").
